ForgeCore helps solo founders, creators, consultants, indie hackers, builders, and small business operators use AI tools to save time, build systems, choose better tools, and create income.

What you will get

  • Tool comparisons and bad-fit warnings.
  • Practical prompts and implementation steps.

Why subscribe

Make better tool decisions

Understand when a tool is worth paying for and when a checklist is enough.

Save time with systems

Turn repeatable work into prompts, checklists, automations, and review loops.

Avoid AI hype

Every recommendation needs a use case, a warning, and a simpler alternative.

Build income assets

Use AI to support content, lead magnets, follow-up, research, and small-business operations.
